== Notes for [[Item:Q114102|Q114102]] ==

The children out of wedlock were:

Ordoño Bermúdez. He married Fronilde Peláez, daughter of Count Pelayo Rodríguez and Countess Gotina Fernández. The infant Ordoño and his wife were the progenitors of the Galician Ordóñez.
--------------------
https://www.genealogieonline.nl/en/lynn-family-tree/P13739.php
--------------------
alternate spelling Fronilde Peláez

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
